game_name: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Imperial stormtrooper attack on base; immediate combat necessity
Emphasized throughout expansion; becomes primary focus alongside Force powers
Mix of damage-dealing and non-violent utility applications; Jade learns independently after Katarn's departure
Advanced projectile weapon option for player choice
Including rancor; builds enemy variety as campaign progresses
Some non-hostile NPCs assist player by attacking enemies; dynamic combat support

element_introduction_order.element: Sith temple lore / Dark side corruption
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Central to narrative climax; Katarn corrupted by dark side power; final duel with protagonist

typical_relief_triggers: Access to Force power utilities (non-damaging applications)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Linear progression with escalating narrative stakes; gameplay emphasis shifts from gunplay to lightsaber/Force combat as campaign advances; story-driven tension builds toward final confrontation with dark-side-corrupted mentor

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate introduction with Imperial attack on Altyr V; blaster-focused combat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy variety and new monster types; independent Force power mastery required
difficulty_curve.late_game: High difficulty; lightsaber and Force power emphasis; culminates in final duel against powerful dark-side-corrupted opponent
notable_spikes: Level 1: Imperial stormtrooper assault on base
Mid-campaign: Rancor encounters and new enemy types
Final sequence: Duel with corrupted Katarn at Sith temple

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 14 levels contains set objectives that must be completed before advancing; linear structure with no branching paths
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 1 - Altyr V outpost: defend base, reach command center, learn of evacuation blockade

notable_level_patterns.description: Campaign begins with Katarn (Level 1), transitions to Mara Jade for majority of game; Katarn absence drives motivation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 1 hands off to Jade; remainder of game controlled by Jade until final confrontation

notable_level_patterns.description: Progression from blaster-focused (early) to lightsaber/Force-focused (late); player tool expansion mirrors narrative growth
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Levels 1-mid: heavy on conventional weapons; late levels: emphasis on Jedi abilities

notable_level_patterns.description: Missions span multiple planets; Imperial outposts, asteroid weapons platforms, Dromund Kaas Sith temple; environmental storytelling
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 1: Altyr V (outpost); later: asteroid bombardment mission; final: Dromund Kaas temple
